title: Flavorful Argentinian Beef Stew
description: A hearty and savory stew featuring tender beef, rich treacle, and a hint of yuzu, all slow-cooked in a cataplana vessel to create a deliciously umami brunch dish
instructions: Heat the olive oil in the cataplana vessel over medium heat
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute
Add the beef chunks and cook until they are browned on all sides
Add the treacle, yuzu juice, and yuzu cure, stirring to combine
Add the chopped red bell pepper and cook until it starts to soften
Add the beef broth and bring the mixture to a boil
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the stew for 2 1/2 hours, or until the beef is tender
Stir in the chopped parsley and season the stew with salt and pepper to taste
Serve the stew hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired
